description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the osrf/ros:lunar-desktop-xenial Docker image. Define a before_script that sets up a catkin workspace in ~/catkin_ws/src, disables ROS language generators, initializes the workspace if missing, links the project directory, updates wstool, clones catkin_simple, installs system packages (software-properties-common, wget, default-jdk-headless, zip, python-pip) and then runs pip install numpy sgp4 pytest pdoc matplotlib scikit-learn scipy numpy codecov pytest-cov mock. Add a single job named docs_and_tests that runs: mkdir ~/docs; cd ~/catkin_ws; catkin_make; source ~/catkin_ws/devel/setup.bash; cd ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}; pytest ${CI_PROJECT_DIR} -v -s --cov=./ --cov-config .coveragerc; rostest --text ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_lib/test/testSimTime.test; rostest --text ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_nodes/rospace_imu/test/launch_IMUnode_integration.test; rostest --text ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_nodes/rospace_imu/test/launch_IMUnode.test; rostest --text ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_nodes/rospace_magnetorquer/test/launch_MagnetorquerNode_integration.test; rostest --text ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_nodes/rospace_flightsoftware/test/launch_FlightSoftwareNode_integration.test; pdoc --html --html-dir ~/docs ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_lib/src/rospace_lib; pdoc --html --html-dir ~/docs ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_plugins/rqt_simtime_plugin/src/rqt_simtime_plugin/; pdoc --html --html-dir ~/docs ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/rospace_nodes/rospace_propagator/src/propagator/; zip -r ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/docs.zip ~/docs/*; CI_REPOSITORY_URL=${CI_REPOSITORY_URL/eSpace-epfl\/}; codecov -e. The job stores docs.zip as an artifact.
